SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Interface JmlParserListener

All Superinterfaces:
ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
JmlParserBaseListener
public interface JmlParserListener extends ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by JmlParser.
